info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Transaction Management API
info.description: The Transaction Management API streamlines the processing and tracking of financial transactions within the microservices architecture. It allows users to initiate, monitor, and manage various transaction types seamlessly. Ideal for financial institutions and payment processing applications, this API supports operations such as validating transaction details and updating transaction statuses, enabling developers to create robust transactional workflows. Utilize this API to optimize transaction handling and enhance overall user experience.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new transaction in the system. Provide the necessary transaction details in the request body to successfully process a transaction.

requestBody.description: The request body for creating a new transaction. It must be a valid JSON object that adheres to the specified schema, which defines the required fields and their respective formats.

200.description: The request was processed successfully and the transaction details are returned.

404.description: The requested transaction resource was not found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Error Response for Transaction Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates if the operation was successful.

error.description: A short description of the error that occurred.

message.description: A longer description of the error providing additional context.
message.example: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the API endpoint that generated the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion on how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: This schema represents the structure of the error response returned by the transaction operations when a server error occurs.

example.message: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

details.message: Payment gateway timeout while processing transaction request.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

accountNumber.description: The account number associated with the transaction.

accountType.description: The type of the account linked to the transaction.

errorCode.description: A specific error code indicating the type of error.

message.description: A user-friendly message describing the error.
message.example: No transaction found for the given ID.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.description: Schema representing detailed error information for the transaction error response.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Response

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with this transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction was made.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, transfer).

amount.description: The amount of money involved in the transaction.

currency.description: The currency type of the transaction amount (e.g., USD, EUR).

status.description: The current status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed).

processedAt.description: The date and time when the transaction was processed.

paymentMode.description: The mode of payment used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer).

message.description: A message related to the transaction status or result.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Response schema for a successful transaction operation. This schema contains the details of the transaction performed.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Request Body

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer initiating the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction will be made.

transactionType.description: The type of the transaction (e.g., debit, credit).

amount.description: The amount of money to be transacted.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction is conducted (e.g., USD, EUR).

beneficiaryAccount.description: The account number of the beneficiary for the transaction.

transactionDate.description: The date when the transaction is initiated.

paymentMode.description: The method used for the payment (e.g., online, cheque).

remarks.description: Any additional remarks regarding the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the request body for creating a transaction.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

error.description: A brief description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message about the error.
message.example: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

path.description: The path of the API endpoint that was called.

trace.description: A trace provided for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for how to resolve the issue.
suggestion.example: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the response when a 404 error occurs during a transaction operation.

example.message: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

details.message: No active account exists for the provided account number.

example.suggestion: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
